'''竏噐-th-d-t''' ('''kayathdetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:celebrate|celebrate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-th-d-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:celebrate|celebrate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏噐-th-d-t
|-
! Lemma
| kayathdetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyathdetoko|thiyathdetoko]] || [[word:jiyathdetoko|jiyathdetoko]] || [[word:shiyathdetoko|shiyathdetoko]] || [[word:kiyathdetoko|kiyathdetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyathdetoko|thuthuyathdetoko]] || [[word:jujuyathdetoko|jujuyathdetoko]] || [[word:shushuyathdetoko|shushuyathdetoko]] || [[word:kukuyathdetoko|kukuyathdetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyathdetoko|thuyathdetoko]] || [[word:juyathdetoko|juyathdetoko]] || [[word:shuyathdetoko|shuyathdetoko]] || [[word:kuyathdetoko|kuyathdetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyathdetoko|thuyathdetoko]] || [[word:juyathdetoko|juyathdetoko]] || [[word:shuyathdetoko|shuyathdetoko]] || [[word:kuyathdetoko|kuyathdetoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyathdetoko|thoyathdetoko]] || [[word:joyathdetoko|joyathdetoko]] || [[word:shoyathdetoko|shoyathdetoko]] || [[word:koyathdetoko|koyathdetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyathdetoko|thoyathdetoko]] || [[word:joyathdetoko|joyathdetoko]] || [[word:shoyathdetoko|shoyathdetoko]] || [[word:koyathdetoko|koyathdetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦyathdetoko|thﾃｦyathdetoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦyathdetoko|jﾃｦyathdetoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦyathdetoko|shﾃｦyathdetoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦyathdetoko|kﾃｦyathdetoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayathdetoko|thayathdetoko]] || [[word:jayathdetoko|jayathdetoko]] || [[word:shayathdetoko|shayathdetoko]] || [[word:kayathdetoko|kayathdetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayathdetoko|thayathdetoko]] || [[word:jayathdetoko|jayathdetoko]] || [[word:shayathdetoko|shayathdetoko]] || [[word:kayathdetoko|kayathdetoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
